subcodes.first_line: The Hidden Secret hath been made manifest through the truth with a sovereignty that encompasseth all the worlds. Verily, He is the Concealed One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: السر المستور قد ظهر بالحق بسلطان کان علی العالمین محیطا انه هو المکنون
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation
